creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: madpilot
Date: Mon Apr 29 07:49:29 2013
New Revision: 316777
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316777

Log:
  - Update to 1.2.2
  - Use PORTDOCS
  - Use space for WWW line in pkg-descr
  
  PR:		ports/178181
  Submitted by:	Veniamin Gvozdikov <g.veniamin@googlemail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/net-im/vacuum-im/Makefile
  head/net-im/vacuum-im/distinfo
  head/net-im/vacuum-im/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-im/vacuum-im/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net-im/vacuum-im/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-im/vacuum-im/Makefile	Mon Apr 29 07:45:20 2013	(r316776)
+++ head/net-im/vacuum-im/Makefile	Mon Apr 29 07:49:29 2013	(r316777)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	vacuum
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.1
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.2
 CATEGORIES=	net-im
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-im
@@ -23,6 +22,8 @@ USE_QT4=	gui xml qmake_build uic_build m
 		network linguist_build webkit
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
+PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS CHANGELOG COPYING README TRANSLATORS
+
 DESKTOP_ENTRIES="Vacuum-IM" "Modular, crossplatform Jabber client" \
 		"${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/vacuum.png" "${PORTNAME}" \
 		"Qt;Network;InstantMessaging;" false

Modified: head/net-im/vacuum-im/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net-im/vacuum-im/distinfo	Mon Apr 29 07:45:20 2013	(r316776)
+++ head/net-im/vacuum-im/distinfo	Mon Apr 29 07:49:29 2013	(r316777)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (vacuum-1.2.1.tar.xz) = 355177f665f234f4b33d5b5da45d53a74865a3c71ac1cff44436f0f2b6a1afa5
-SIZE (vacuum-1.2.1.tar.xz) = 1614516
+SHA256 (vacuum-1.2.2.tar.xz) = 1d0faa83c5610a2f525494c15d233c09bc89b7b9f079a20aac07ce497adef3da
+SIZE (vacuum-1.2.2.tar.xz) = 1612692

Modified: head/net-im/vacuum-im/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net-im/vacuum-im/pkg-descr	Mon Apr 29 07:45:20 2013	(r316776)
+++ head/net-im/vacuum-im/pkg-descr	Mon Apr 29 07:49:29 2013	(r316777)
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@ The core program is just a plugin loader
 via plugins. This enforces modularity and ensures well defined component
 interaction via interfaces.
 
-WWW:	http://code.google.com/p/vacuum-im/
+WWW: http://code.google.com/p/vacuum-im/
